name: incompliance-radar
description: AI-powered platform for tracking global compliance monitorships, DPAs, and NPAs

name: ibrief
description: Selbstverbesserndes, personalisiertes Morning Briefing — lokal-first in Rust mit lokalen LLMs. Lernt Gewichte, Prompts und Quellen; Anti-Blase by design.

name: keepers
description: AI photo culling that scores, blink-checks, groups, and shortlists a 3,000-shot session on the phone itself — Aftershoot power without the desktop or the $30/month.

name: selene
description: A cycle, fertility, and perimenopause tracker whose AI insight engine runs entirely on-device — no server to subpoena, breach, or sell data from, verifiable in airplane mode.

name: sitescribe
description: Offline AI field-documentation copilot: photograph, dictate, and auto-generate structured inspection reports, receipts, and job records at zero signal, syncing when coverage returns.

name: flank
description: The living competitor radar for B2B SaaS: always-on agents maintain versioned, citation-pinned dossiers and self-refreshing battlecards per rival, pushing only material deltas — what changed, why it matters, how to respond.
